data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"97fc-b2ca","generatedAt":"2026-04-13T12:32:52Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Large-Refactor Review Path","description":"The current code review workflow handles feature additions and targeted bug fixes well, but breaks down for large cross-cutting refactors \u2014 commits touching 20 or more files with a uniform transformation applied across them (renames, signature changes, import path migrations). Two failure modes occur today: the 600-line limit rejects large diffs outright with no usable alternative, and the classifier misscores uniform mechanical changes as low-complexity, routing them to haiku reviewers that lack the context to cover the full diff.","successCriteria":["A commit touching >=20 files (excluding .test-index) is automatically diverted from REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md into a new REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md without any manual intervention","REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE identifies confirmed refactors by sampling 7 stratified files and requiring >=5/7 to show a consistent transformation pattern; confirmed refactors proceed through haiku batch agents + a new refactor-anomaly opus reviewer that checks only flagged anomalous files","Non-refactor large commits (pattern confidence below threshold) return to the standard review path; before dispatching any sub-agent the workflow emits a MODEL_OVERRIDE: opus signal, and all tier sub-agents are instantiated with the opus model regardless of classifier tier; the final findings file is identical in schema to the standard review path output","When a diff exceeds 600 lines the classifier appends SIZE_WARNING: <line_count> lines to its output and continues processing; no diff is ever returned with REJECTED status solely due to line count","The refactor-anomaly opus reviewer emits a structured findings block with one entry per anomalous file, each carrying a dimension label (pattern_conformance | behavioral_drift | callsite_completeness), a severity (critical | important | minor), and a description; the review is considered passing when no critical findings are present",".test-index is excluded from the file count threshold check","The diversion threshold is configurable via review.huge_diff_file_threshold (default: 20, must be a positive integer) in dso-config.conf; setting 0 or a negative integer is rejected with a validation error at threshold-check time","The classifier-size-output.md contract is updated to replace size_action: reject with size_action: warn; all consumers branching on size_action are verified to handle the new value before the change ships","CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and dso-config.example.conf include the new review.huge_diff_file_threshold key with default value (20) and valid range (positive integers only)","If fewer than 7 files are eligible for sampling after .test-index and binary/generated file exclusions, sampling is skipped and the commit is treated as low confidence, routing directly to the fallback path"]},"stories":[{"id":"2fd3-abae","title":"As a developer, large commits are automatically routed to the specialized review path based on file count","description":"Add file-count threshold check to REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md; divert to REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md for >=20 files","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, a commit with >=20 changed files (excluding .test-index) triggers diversion to REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md","When this story is complete, .test-index is excluded from the file count","When this story is complete, threshold=0 or negative causes a validation error","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Threshold check logic must be testable without running a full review workflow"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"A commit touching >=20 files is automatically diverted from REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md into a new REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md without any manual intervention"},{"id":"a491-b83a","title":"As a developer, my large diff is never rejected solely due to line count; the classifier warns instead","description":"Modify classifier to emit SIZE_WARNING; update classifier-size-output.md contract; audit all consumers","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, >=600 line commit \u2192 SIZE_WARNING:<count> and size_action:warn, never size_action:reject","When this story is complete, classifier-size-output.md contract defines size_action:warn (not reject)","When this story is complete, no file references size_action:reject as valid enum value","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Existing consumers checking size_action=='reject' will silently pass on warn \u2014 exhaustive audit required","[Testing] SIZE_WARNING behavior must be testable with injected line counts"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2fd3-abae"],"satisfiesCriterion":"When a diff exceeds 600 lines the classifier appends SIZE_WARNING and continues processing; no diff is ever returned with REJECTED status solely due to line count"},{"id":"e8ca-abab","title":"As a developer, the large-commit review path classifies my commit's transformation pattern before routing","description":"Create REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md with stratified sampling, haiku pattern extraction, consensus routing, and review-recording integration","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md exists with 7-file stratified sampling","When this story is complete, >=5/7 \u2192 confirmed-refactor path; <5/7 \u2192 fallback","When this story is complete, <7 eligible files \u2192 fallback with low-confidence status","When this story is complete, REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md includes review-recording step via record-review.sh","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] haiku call must be mockable","[Reliability] pattern extraction failure \u2192 low-confidence fallback","[Maintainability] Define contract for extracted-pattern artifact consumed by S3"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2fd3-abae"],"satisfiesCriterion":"REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE identifies confirmed refactors by sampling 7 stratified files and requiring >=5/7 to show a consistent transformation pattern"},{"id":"efe7-7f1d","title":"As a developer, a confirmed large refactor is reviewed by haiku agents and an opus anomaly reviewer","description":"Implement confirmed-refactor branch: haiku batch agents + code-reviewer-refactor-anomaly opus agent","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, haiku batch agents dispatched in groups respecting orchestration.max_agents","When this story is complete, anomaly reviewer emits per-file findings with dimension/severity/description","When this story is complete, agent file exists and dispatched inline; output schema-compatible with record-review.sh","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Anomaly reviewer timeout \u2014 define max flagged-file count","[Testing] Batch grouping algorithm unit-testable without live agents","[Maintainability] Consistent with existing batch patterns","[Architecture] Schema bridge approach (map vs. extend) must be decided at implementation-plan time"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e8ca-abab"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Confirmed refactors proceed through haiku batch agents + a new refactor-anomaly opus reviewer that checks only flagged anomalous files"},{"id":"cf76-7091","title":"As a developer, a large non-refactor commit gets a full-coverage review with all agents upgraded to opus","description":"Implement fallback branch: MODEL_OVERRIDE: opus signal + opus enforcement for all tier sub-agents","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, low-confidence commits emit MODEL_OVERRIDE: opus before dispatch","When this story is complete, all tier sub-agents use opus model; findings schema identical to standard","When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing"],"considerations":["[Architecture] MODEL_OVERRIDE must be reconciled with REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md model immutability rule","[Testing] MODEL_OVERRIDE enforcement observable in workflow output","[Maintainability] Consistent with existing model-override patterns"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e8ca-abab"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Non-refactor large commits return to the standard review path with MODEL_OVERRIDE: opus signal; all tier sub-agents instantiated with opus model"},{"id":"b2d0-ca89","title":"As an operator, the large-commit review threshold is documented and configurable","description":"Add review.huge_diff_file_threshold to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and dso-config.example.conf","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has review.huge_diff_file_threshold entry","When this story is complete, dso-config.example.conf has review.huge_diff_file_threshold=20 with inline comment"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2fd3-abae"],"satisfiesCriterion":"CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and dso-config.example.conf include the new review.huge_diff_file_threshold key with default value (20) and valid range (positive integers only)"},{"id":"bb6b-5493","title":"Update project docs to reflect large-refactor review path","description":"Update CLAUDE.md tiered review description and any stale 600-line rejection references","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md tiered review description reflects SIZE_WARNING and REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md routing","When this story is complete, no file describes 600-line hard rejection as current behavior without a correction"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2fd3-abae","e8ca-abab","efe7-7f1d","cf76-7091","a491-b83a","b2d0-ca89"],"satisfiesCriterion":"All epic success criteria (documentation ensures future agents operate correctly within the new system)"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":7,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["2fd3-abae","e8ca-abab","cf76-7091"]}}
